prompt: Redraw all food icons in a blend of the cartoon thickness of Reference 1 and the pastel color style of Reference 2
prompt_refined: Generate a new image displaying the six food icons from image 1: an ice cream sundae, a lidded drink cup, a hot dog, a steaming coffee mug, french fries, and a milkshake. Arrange these icons in the same 2x3 grid layout as shown in image 1. The icons should feature the thick, bold cartoon outlines characteristic of the apple in image 2 and be filled with the soft, muted pastel color palette exemplified by image 3.
objects: ice cream sundae icon with thick, bold cartoon outline and soft, muted pastel colors
lidded drink cup icon with thick, bold cartoon outline and soft, muted pastel colors
